title: <color=red>test color</color>
body:
🆕What's New?:

✅Added Smoothing system for camera
Three configurable sliders in the menu:
 • Position: Positional movement smoothing
 -Rotation: Rotation/orientation smoothing
 -Snap to Object: Auto-adjustment to selected object

⚠️Note: The Snap slider doesn't work very well for now. It's recommended to keep it at 0. I'll keep investigating and improving its functionality in future versions.
